mapper.sql: id, entrusted_id, entrustment_no, amount, registration_date, payment_method, payment_source, note, create_time, update_time, registrant
mapper.insert: insert into test_entrust_remittance_registration (id, entrusted_id, entrustment_no, amount, registration_date, payment_method, payment_source, note, create_time, update_time, registrant) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{entrustedId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entrustmentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{amount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{registrationDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{paymentMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{registrant,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into test_entrust_remittance_registration
id,
entrusted_id,
entrustment_no,
amount,
registration_date,
payment_method,
payment_source,
note,
create_time,
update_time,
registrant,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{entrustedId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{entrustmentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

mapper.update:
update test_entrust_remittance_registration
entrusted_id = #{entrustedId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
entrustment_no = #{entrustmentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
amount = #{amount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
registration_date = #{registrationDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
payment_method = #{paymentMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
payment_source = #{paymentSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
note = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
registrant = #{registrant,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update test_entrust_remittance_registration set entrusted_id = #{entrustedId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, entrustment_no = #{entrustmentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, amount = #{amount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, registration_date = #{registrationDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, payment_source = #{paymentSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, note = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, registrant = #{registrant,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
